allow: Bash(powershell -c "Get-Process -Name postgres* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_LocalPort -gt 5000 -and $_LocalPort -lt 6000} | Select LocalPort,OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -c "Get-Process -Name postgres* 2>$null | Select-Object Id,Name; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen 2>$null | Where-Object LocalPort -gt 5400 | Where-Object LocalPort -lt 5500 | Select LocalPort")

Bash(powershell -Command "& { $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3334 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host ''killed'' } else { Write-Host ''not found'' } }")
